messages.content:
Use simple Chinese to re-describe the following content without repeated descriptions

Alibaba announced a major restructuring plan to split its US$257 billion empire into six independent entities last Tuesday, saying it would lead to quicker decision-making and give each unit greater operational independence.
Each company will be allowed to “pursue fundraising from third parties and IPOs when they are ready,” said Daniel Zhang Yong, chairman and chief executive of Alibaba, which also owns the South China Morning Post.
The other five units to be devolved are Cloud Intelligence Group, Taobao Tmall Commerce Group, Local Services Group, Global Digital Commerce Group and the Digital Media and Entertainment Group.

Alibaba will divide into six independently operated entities to speed up decision-making and give each unit more independence. Each company can seek funding and IPOs when they are prepared. The five other units are Cloud Intelligence Group, Taobao Tmall Commerce Group, Local Services Group, Global Digital Commerce Group, and Digital Media and Entertainment Group.

Cannot carry the above translation content, please help me translate the following content into Simplified Chinese

Cainiao has become the hot favourite to conduct an IPO first, with analysts saying it has played “a critical role” in supporting Alibaba’s e-commerce operations at home and abroad.
“Within the Alibaba ecosystem, Cainiao has provided significant support for [the e-commerce business] of Taobao and Tmall,” said Zhang Yi, CEO and chief analyst at iiMedia Research. “As an open logistics system, it also has significant growth potential [as a stand-alone company].”
Analysts also noted Cainiao’s critical role in overseas markets.
菜鸟公司成为首选的IPO公司，分析师表示，菜鸟在支持阿里巴巴国内外电子商务运营方面发挥了“至关重要的作用”。iiMedia Research的CEO和首席分析师张毅表示：“在阿里巴巴生态系统内，菜鸟为淘宝和天猫的电子商务业务提供了重要支持。作为一个开放的物流系统，它还具有巨大的增长潜力（作为独立公司）。 "分析师还指出，菜鸟在海外市场发挥了关键作用。

Cannot carry the above translation content, please help me translate the following content into Simplified Chinese

Alibaba announced a major restructuring plan to split its US$257 billion empire into six independent entities last Tuesday, saying it would lead to quicker decision-making and give each unit greater operational independence.
Each company will be allowed to “pursue fundraising from third parties and IPOs when they are ready,” said Daniel Zhang Yong, chairman and chief executive of Alibaba, which also owns the South China Morning Post.
The other five units to be devolved are Cloud Intelligence Group, Taobao Tmall Commerce Group, Local Services Group, Global Digital Commerce Group and the Digital Media and Entertainment Group.

上周二，阿里巴巴宣布了一项重大重组计划，将其价值2570亿美元的帝国分为六个独立的实体，称这将导致更快的决策，并使每个单位获得更大的运营独立性。
阿里巴巴董事长兼CEO张勇表示，每个公司都将被允许“在准备就绪时追求第三方融资和IPO”。阿里巴巴还拥有《南华早报》。
另外要剥离的五家公司是云智能事业群、淘宝天猫消费者事业群、本地服务事业群、全球数字贸易事业群和数字媒体和娱乐事业群。

Cannot carry the above translation content, please help me translate the following content into Simplified Chinese

Hong Kong recently eased its listing rules for tech start-ups, allowing companies with a valuation of at least HK$10 billion (US$1.3 billion) to sell shares, even if they have not yet generated any sales revenue.
In addition, the minimum valuation for companies with at least HK$250 million in sales in the previous financial year has been lowered from HK$8 billion to HK$6 billion. This means that Cainiao meets the requirements to be listed under Hong Kong’s regulations, which came into effect on March 31.

香港最近放宽了科技初创企业的上市规定，允许估值至少达到100亿港元（合13亿美元）的公司出售股票，即使它们尚未产生任何销售收入。
此外，对于上一个财年销售额至少达到2.5亿港元的公司，最低估值从80亿港元降至60亿港元。这意味着，菜鸟符合香港规定的条件，在3月31日生效的规定下可以在香港上市。

Cannot carry the above translation content, please help me translate the following content into Simplified Chinese

iiMedia’s Zhang said the developments reflect the fact that Big Tech companies in China “have grown to a certain level and face development bottlenecks”, hence it is an “inevitable choice”.
Wei from Analysys agrees, seeing spin-off plans as “beneficial for improving regulation at the national level”, while also enabling companies to “shed the burden of the group” and better serve customers.

艾媒咨询的张毅表示，这些发展反映了中国大型科技公司“已经发展到一定程度，面临发展瓶颈”，因此这是一个“必然的选择”。
易观国际的魏传宝也同意这一看法，他认为拆分计划“有利于提高国家层面的监管”，同时使企业“摆脱集团的负担”，更好地服务客户。

Use simple Chinese to re-describe the following content without repeated descriptions

The research fellow at Shanghai Jiao Tong University trawled websites for reviews, kicked tyres at half a dozen showrooms and asked detailed questions about resale values, add-on services and enhancements before settling on a P7 sedan made by electric-vehicle (EV) start-up Xpeng in early March.
What sold him on the P7 was the EV’s driver-assistance system and its voice-command functions. He paid 250,000 yuan (US$36,340) for the EV by the Guangzhou-based carmaker.

这位上海交通大学的研究员在三月初查阅了许多网站的评论，在半打展厅实地考察并提出了关于再销售价值、附加服务和增强实用性的详细问题，最终选择了由电动汽车初创企业小鹏汽车制造的P7轿车。
让他决定购买P7的是这款电动汽车的驾驶辅助系统和语音指令功能。他为这款由位于广州的汽车制造商生产的电动汽车支付了25万元人民币（约合36340美元）。

Use simple Chinese to re-describe the following content without repeated descriptions

“For example, they prefer strong voice-command functions, which is very different from western drivers. Indeed, some Chinese smart-car assemblers have proved to be superior to global rivals in terms of digital cockpit development.”
Nio’s ET7 comes equipped with PanoCinema, a panoramic and immersive digital cockpit boasting augmented-reality (AR) and virtual-reality (VR) technologies. The PanoCinema system is powered by 256-colour curtain ambient lighting and a Dolby Atmos 7.1.4 surround-sound system.
Tesla’s theatre function allows various video-streaming services to be played on its controls screen while parked. Model Y users are also able to use the steering wheel buttons to play video games through its Arcade system.

例如，中国消费者喜欢强大的语音指令功能，这与西方驾驶员非常不同。事实上，一些中国智能汽车制造公司在数字驾驶舱开发方面已经证明比全球竞争对手更为优秀。
蔚来公司的ET7配备了PanoCinema，这是一个全景和沉浸式数字驾驶舱，拥有增强现实（AR）和虚拟现实（VR）技术。PanoCinema系统由256色幕布环境照明和杜比全景声7.1.4环绕声系统驱动。
特斯拉的剧院功能允许在停车时通过其控制屏幕播放各种视频流服务。 Model Y用户还可以通过其Arcade系统使用方向盘按钮玩视频游戏。

Use simple Chinese to re-describe the following content without repeated descriptions

“They are not designed for Chinese drivers and passengers, and they are not the up-to-date smart vehicles that many rich Chinese consumers desire,” said Eric Han, a senior manager at Suolei, an advisory firm in Shanghai. “But the cars are still deemed high-quality and value-for-money products in China, because of Tesla’s strong brand awareness.”
Tesla’s main Chinese competitors – Nio, Xpeng and Li Auto – have developed battery-powered cars ranging from sedans and coupes to full-size SUVs with longer driving ranges than the Model 3 and Model Y.

上海咨询公司速立的高级经理Eric Han表示：“这些车不是为中国驾驶员和乘客设计的，也不是许多富裕的中国消费者所渴望的智能汽车，但由于特斯拉品牌的强大知名度，这些汽车在中国仍被认为是高质量的物有所值的产品。”
特斯拉的主要中国竞争对手，包括Nio、小鹏汽车和理想汽车等，已经推出了从轿车和跑车到大型SUV的电池驱动汽车，这些电动汽车的续航里程比Model 3和Model Y长。
